prompting.responds_best_to: Precise code context — surrounding code, signatures, and the exact gap to fill. Use the FIM endpoint for completions.
prompting.avoid: Prose instructions or open-ended design questions — it is a code-completion specialist.
prompting.system_prompt_prefix: Output only code that fits the surrounding context; no explanation.

quirks: Supports fill-in-the-middle (FIM) — use the dedicated FIM endpoint for inline completion; the chat endpoint also works for generation
Code-only — not for prose or reasoning
Fast and cheap for high-volume code assist
No tool use — orchestrate it, don't hand it agentic loops

handoff.output_format_instruction: Ask for raw code only (or a FIM completion); specify language and that prose is excluded.
handoff.evaluation_notes: Lint/run the output; verify it didn't hallucinate APIs and that edge cases are covered.
